Panel layout & density.question: Primary layout arrangement
Panel layout & density.answer: 4-column fixed grid: Left sidebar (queue+alerts) | Center-left wide (draft board) | Center-right (best available) | Right sidebar (roster+chat). Fixed proportions, no resizing.

Panel layout & density.question: Draft board grid
Panel layout & density.answer: Fixed-size cells, horizontal scroll for large leagues. Cell content: player last name + position badge (color-coded) + NFL team abbr.

Panel layout & density.question: Panel headers
Panel layout & density.answer: Thin header bar with JetBrains Mono label + chevron collapse toggle per panel.

Panel layout & density.question: Pick cell content
Panel layout & density.answer: Name + position badge + team abbr. Auto-pick flagged with small icon badge. Click for details.

Panel layout & density.question: On the clock visual
Panel layout & density.answer: Team column highlighted with pulsing accent border. Pick clock in board header: 'TEAM NAME on the clock' + countdown.

Pick clock & auto-draft.question: Clock authority
Pick clock & auto-draft.answer: Server-authoritative: Redis stores pick_deadline. Clients run local countdown from deadline. Server fires auto-draft on timeout.

Pick clock & auto-draft.question: Warning states
Pick clock & auto-draft.answer: 30s: text-warning (amber). 10s: text-danger (red) + pulse. No audio at warnings.

Pick clock & auto-draft.question: Auto-draft when queue empty
Pick clock & auto-draft.answer: Best available with positional need weighting (ADP score + how many starters needed vs spots remaining).

Pick clock & auto-draft.question: Commissioner pause/resume
Pick clock & auto-draft.answer: Pause freezes clock. All clients show semi-transparent 'DRAFT PAUSED' overlay. Resume shows 5-second countdown.

Pick clock & auto-draft.question: Audio cues
Pick clock & auto-draft.answer: Two triggers: (1) soft chime when any pick confirmed, all hear. (2) distinct 'your turn' tone when your team on the clock. Both mutable.

Pick clock & auto-draft.question: Reconnect behavior
Pick clock & auto-draft.answer: Client tracks last_event_id. On reconnect, server replays all events since that ID from Redis stream. Board rebuilds from replay.

Rankings & queue UX.question: Initial rankings source
Rankings & queue UX.answer: FantasyCalc rankings (overallRank + positionRank from ProjectionService already integrated in Phase 2).

Rankings & queue UX.question: Rankings scope
Rankings & queue UX.answer: Each participant has their own personal rankings and queue. Draft board (pick grid) is shared. Queue is strictly personal.

Rankings & queue UX.question: Queue add UX
Rankings & queue UX.answer: Star/heart button on hover next to each player in best available. Click to queue. Drag-and-drop to reorder. Queue panel shows count.

Rankings & queue UX.question: Filter UX
Rankings & queue UX.answer: Position filter tab strip (ALL | QB | RB | WR | TE | K | DEF) + live search box. Can combine. Matching picks dim (not disappear) per DR-13.

Rankings & queue UX.question: Tier display
Rankings & queue UX.answer: Visual tier dividers in best available list. Horizontal divider row: 'TIER 1 (1-3)', etc. Tiers auto-calculated from ADP gaps.

Rankings & queue UX.question: Pick suggestions on the clock
Rankings & queue UX.answer: Best available list shows 'From your queue' section at top (top 3 queued players) then full ranked list below when it's your turn.
